resourceTemplates.name: anthropic-agents-list
resourceTemplates.title: List Anthropic agents with filters
resourceTemplates.description: List Anthropic Managed Agents with optional created_at filters, archive inclusion, and cursor pagination.

resourceTemplates.name: anthropic-agent-detail
resourceTemplates.title: Get Anthropic agent detail
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieve the latest version of an Anthropic Managed Agent by agent id.

resourceTemplates.name: anthropic-agent-detail-versioned
resourceTemplates.title: Get Anthropic agent detail by version
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieve a specific version of an Anthropic Managed Agent by agent id and version number.

resourceTemplates.name: anthropic-agent-versions
resourceTemplates.title: List Anthropic agent versions
resourceTemplates.description: List available versions of an Anthropic Managed Agent with cursor pagination.
